Video.summary: When Nick Colette, the hot-headed son of a "retired" mobster Tommy Colette, joins forces with his father, Eastbridge's crime troubles start.
Video.title: Family Business

Video.summary: Commissioner Scali and his team of officers pull out all stops as they try to beat the clock in a desperate search for the kidnapper of a very sick baby.
Video.title: The Sharp Pinch

Video.summary: Tony suspects foul play when a member of a commando-like squad of elite prep-school students -- perpetrators of a series of break-in thefts -- disappears.
Video.title: Dead Cadet's Society

Video.summary: Tony joins a video-dating service when he suspects one of his clients is a murderous thief. Also, Stan tries to protect Carmela from a calirvoyant's curse.
Video.title: The Heart's A Lonely Sucker

Video.summary: After Tony's expensive new automobile is stolen from him at gunpoint, he and Cyd clash over the best way to capture Eastbridge's busiest carjackers.
Video.title: Stoned

Video.summary: Armed robber Andy DuPree, has managed to allude authorities across the country and has once again returned to his hometown for his next round of scores.
Video.title: No Good Deed

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust an athletic beachcomber wanted for the armed robbery of a police van, he is blind sided by a female bounty hunter
Video.title: Dead End And Easy Money

Video.summary: When Reno attempts to bust his latest bounty at a railway station, the man slips from his grasp and the station, but not before stealing a car and killing the owner.
Video.title: White Picket Fences

Video.summary: Reno saddles up to help when a friend of Bobby's is injured after uncovering a group of cattle rustlers operating through a traveling rodeo.
Video.title: Rustlers' Rodeo

Video.summary: Reno and Cheyenne must pump themselves up when they go after a former weight lifter turned drug dealer
Video.title: Muscle Beach

Video.summary: Reno finds himself an unwilling celebrity while in San Diego tracking a "rave" party coordinator who is responsible for the near death of a teenage party goer.
Video.title: The Late Shift

Video.summary: Reno finds himself as prey in the middle of a dangerous "hunt" after he and Bobby meet up with a former protege of Sixkiller Enterprises.
Video.title: Thrill Kill

Video.summary: When Reno locates a missing teen, he finds it nearly impossible to persuade her to leave her seemingly comfortable life as a high-priced call girl until a recent "graduate" is found murdered.
Video.title: Teen Angel

Video.summary: Reno finds himself in a dangerous web when his former partner turns to him for help in locating a dirty cop she testified against who has now issued a "contract" on her life.
Video.title: Den Of Thieves

Video.summary: Bobby finds his liquid assets quickly evaporating when his banker embezzles 150 million dollars and heads to sunny Mexico.
Video.title: Rancho Escondido

Video.summary: Rita's investigates the murder of a wealthy stockbroker.
Video.title: In The Name Of Love

Video.summary: A serial sex killer with a penchant for the personals forces Rita to put herself on the line.
Video.title: Dirty Laundry

Video.summary: A naked body of a well-known congressman washes up near his beach front compound.
Video.title: Men Seeking Women

Video.summary: The murder of a despised tabloid newspaper publisher provides Chns and Rita with a wide array of suspects.
Video.title: Hardcopy

Video.summary: A high school girlfriend of Chris' becomes a suspect in the murder of an aging actress.
Video.title: Curtain Call

Video.summary: A fraternity initiation results in the murder of a young coed.
Video.title: The Brotherhood

Video.summary: As a pair of wealthy brothers elaborate plan to inherit their disabled mother's fortune go awry, a disgruntled alcoholic police sergeant takes a contract out on Harry's life.
Video.title: Pink Elephants

Video.summary: A cadaver found in a film producer's bed leads Tom and Cassy to investigate a string of suspicious deaths.
Video.title: Three Weeks Of The Condor

Video.summary: Tom and Cassy investigate a series of murders that appear to be the work of a vampire.
Video.title: I Love The Nightlife

Video.summary: The death of a military academy's only female cadet appears to be murder.
Video.title: The Rock

Video.summary: Tom questions the story of a woman whose husband was murdered by a gang of art thieves.
Video.title: Pretty In Black

Video.summary: A voodoo priest whose spell has driven an acolyte to murder now threatens Cassy.
Video.title: Silent Witness
